projectDescription: A multi-model AI agent desktop client that connects 17+ AI providers, extends with MCP servers and skills, supports remote control via messaging apps, and keeps all data local.
keyFeatures: 17+ AI provider support (Anthropic, OpenRouter, AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex, Ollama, and more)
MCP server integration with stdio/sse/http transport and runtime monitoring
Skills system with custom, project-level, and global skills from skills.sh marketplace
Remote Bridge — control CodePilot from Telegram, Feishu, Discord, QQ, and WeChat
Assistant Workspace with persona files (soul.md, user.md, claude.md, memory.md) and persistent memory
Generative UI — AI-created interactive dashboards and visual widgets rendered live in-app
Session management: pause, resume, rewind to checkpoint, split-screen dual sessions
Media Studio with AI image generation, batch tasks, gallery, and tagging
Task Scheduler with cron-based and interval scheduling
Local SQLite storage — all data stays on your machine
Import Claude Code CLI .jsonl session history
Token usage and cost tracking with daily charts
publicApiSurface: POST /api/chat/messages — send a message and stream AI response
GET /api/chat/messages — list messages for a session
GET/POST /api/providers — list and manage AI provider configurations
GET/POST /api/plugins — list and manage MCP server plugins
GET/POST /api/settings — read and write application settings
GET/POST /api/bridge — manage IM bridge channel bindings
GET/POST /api/media — image generation jobs and gallery
GET /api/files — file tree browsing for a working directory
GET /api/git — git status, branches, and commits
GET /api/usage — token and cost usage analytics
GET /api/doctor — provider diagnostics and health probes
